---
title: "Methodology"
---

::: {.page-intro}
[Approach and workflow]{.muted-label}

Use this page to explain how the analysis will be carried out from raw data to final insight. The structure below is a solid default for a class project site.
:::

::: {.content-grid}
::: {.section-card}
## Data Sources

List the datasets, APIs, or files you are using. Include a short note on where the data comes from and why it is suitable.
:::

::: {.section-card}
## Data Preparation

- Cleaning and validation
- Feature selection or transformation
- Joining, filtering, or reshaping data
:::

::: {.section-card}
## Analysis Approach

Explain the methods you will use, such as descriptive analytics, visual exploration, clustering, forecasting, or comparison across groups.
:::

::: {.section-card}
## Tools and Workflow

Document the tools used in the project, for example Quarto, Python, R, Tableau, or other visual analytics software.
:::
:::
